title: stylisma evolvuloides var. angustifolia
intro: Stylisma evolvuloides var. angustifolia, also known as Narrow-leaved Stylisma, is a plant species belonging to the Convolvulaceae family, native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's leaves and roots are said to have medicinal properties that provide relief from pain, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Narrow-leaved Stylisma is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its health benefits, which include reducing fever, alleviating joint pain, and improving skin health.
